title: Garrison Moon
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Eaw_KesselMoon.jpg]] |name=Garrison Moon |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] |sector=[[Kessel sector/Legends|Kessel sector]] |system=[[Kessel system/Legends|Kessel system]]''[[Jedi Search]]'' |coordinates=T-10''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited=[[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]''[[Jedi Search]]'' |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday=13 standard hours |lengthyear=644 local days |class= |diameter= |atmosphere=None |climate= |gravity=Variable |terrain=Barren rock |water= |interest=[[Kessel Correctional Facility]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=None |otherspecies=Many species |socialgroup= |language=[[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]] |government= |population=9,000 |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Doole's defense fleet|Doole's Defense Fleet]]''[[Jedi Search]]'' *[[Smugglers' Alliance]]''[[Champions of the Force]]'' }} {{Quote|We're picking up numerous alarms from the moonbase. It appears to be some sort of military installation.|[[Unidentified stormtrooper captain (Maw Installation)|An unidentified stormtrooper captain]]|}} The '''Garrison Moon''' was the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]], and was commonly referred to by the miners of Kessel as the '''Sky Bogey'''. It was shattered by the [[Death Star prototype]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], but a large fragment of it was still orbiting Kessel as of [[43 ABY]]. ==Description== The moon appeared to have been hollowed out in order to house the [[Kessel Correctional Facility]] and a garrison. Only a large docking bay and a communications tower were visible on the surface. Slave pens and processing centers took up the first four levels of the facility, while the command center was on the lower, fifth level. ==History== ===Imperial period=== During the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the Garrison Moon was chosen to host an Imperial garrison station. Prisoners destined for the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|Spice Mines of Kessel]] were commonly transported first to the Garrison Moon's correctional facility, where they were sent through a decontamination process before being loaded on a cargo [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] for the trip to Kessel itself. Some prisoners were sent back to the moon to carry out menial services for the administration staff. After the fall of the Empire, Kessel, along with its moon, were taken over by the [[Rybet/Legends|Rybet]] [[Moruth Doole]], who housed his [[Doole's defense fleet|fleet]] in the correctional facility's large docking bay. ===Moruth Doole's rule=== {{Quote|If we're going to invest, we should see these alleged defenses. We know about the energy shield left by the Imperial Correction Facility. But do you have a fleet of any sort?''"'''
''"''Moruth, if there's something you don't want us to see...''"''
''"''No, no, it's no trouble at all. I'll just have to arrange a shuttle up to the moonbase. I don't want you to think we have anything to hide!|Luke Skywalker, Lando Calrissian, and Moruth Doole on Doole's Defense Fleet|}} [[File:Kessel_SWCCG.png|thumb|right|200px|Kessel and the Garrison Moon]] Seven years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] attempted to form an alliance with Kessel, sending [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] to meet with Doole. As they flew towards Kessel in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], dozens of ships launched from the moon and shot down Solo and Chewbacca, causing them to crash on Kessel's surface. Eventually, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] went to Kessel to investigate the disappearance of the ''Falcon''. Posing as entrepreneurs wishing to invest in the spice mines, they met with Doole in the [[Kessel prison]], who gave them a tour of his operation. When Skywalker inquired about the planet's defense, Doole arranged for a shuttle to take them up to the Garrison Moon. As they landed in the moon's hangar, Skywalker and Calrissian began to inspect the ships docked there, eventually identifying the ''Millennium Falcon''; the ship having been seized by Doole and integrated into his fleet. The pair, upon entering the ship and confirming that it was indeed the ''Falcon'', grabbed Doole and demanded to know where Solo and Chewbacca were. Doole pulled out a hidden [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] but Skywalker quickly reacted and [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Push|pushed]] him away with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] as he fired, causing the bolt to ricochet around. Doole scrambled away and raised the alarm, as Skywalker and Calrissian took the ''Falcon'' and piloted it out of the hangar, with Doole's fleet in pursuit. Shortly after, Doole, angry about being tricked, entered the moon's control room and yelled to his fleet's pilots that Skywalker and Calrissian were to be killed. However, the pair managed to escape when the stolen [[Sun Crusher]] arrived, followed by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nataasi Daala|Daala's]] [[Maw fleet|fleet]] of [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyers]]. ===Destruction=== {{Quote|You missed.''"''
''"''What?''"''
''"''You hit the moon, not the planet.|Golanda and Tol Sivron after destroying the Garrison Moon|}} [[File:Garrison_Moon_go_boom.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The Garrison Moon is destroyed by the prototype Death Star.]] Eventually, [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] and the [[Smugglers' Alliance]] managed to take the moon and planet from Doole, who had barricaded himself inside of the prison and was later killed by one of Kessel's [[Energy spider]]s. Like Doole, Jade also placed her [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] in the moon's hangar. Calrissian, this time truly wishing to invest, bought the spice mines and Garrison Moon from Jade. While inspecting his new operation, the [[Death Star prototype]], commanded by the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Tol Sivron]], arrived from the nearby [[Maw Cluster/Legends|Maw Cluster]], having recently escaped from a [[Battle of the Maw|raid]] by the New Republic on the [[Maw Installation]]. Sivron and his scientists onboard decided to test the destructive power of the prototype Death Star's [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] on Kessel. When the superlaser's fired, its targeting mechanism was so badly out of alignment that the Death Star missed Kessel totally and hit the moon instead, destroying it. Causalities were minimal, however, as the majority of the Smuggler Alliance fleet had evacuated as soon as the Death Star prototype appeared, with only two ships being caught in the blast and another being hit by the moon's debris. ===Remnant=== {{Quote|That was gonna be my garrison!|Lando Calrissian reacting to the moon's destruction|}} After its destruction, many pieces of the moon were pulled towards Kessel due to its gravity and burned up in the atmosphere. At least one piece stayed in orbit and was large enough to be visible from Kessel's surface.''[[Fate of the Jedi: Outcast]]'' In [[43 ABY]], it was used as the evacuation point for Kessel's workers and inhabitants while Lando Calrissian and his friends attempted to save Kessel from destruction. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' *''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Hologram}} *''[[Jedi Search]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Champions of the Force]]'' *''[[Young Jedi Knights: Crisis at Crystal Reef]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Fate of the Jedi: Outcast]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Outcast (audiobook)}} {{C|Remains}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of the Garrison Moon}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{Kids1997Cite|12|Star Wars Kids Feature Planet|Feature Planet: Kessel}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030501kessel|text=Kessel: Hell in Space|int=Kessel: Hell in Space}} *''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kessels Garnisonsmond |fr=Lune Garrison |fi=Varuskuntakuu }} [[Category:Destroyed moons]] [[Category:Galactic Empire moons]] [[Category:Kessel system locations]] [[Category:Moons in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Moons in the Slice]] [[Category:Rocky moons]]
